name: Trent Grisham
transactions: June 8, 2015:Drafted by theMilwaukee Brewersin the1st round(15th pick) of the 2015 amateur draft. Player signed June 15, 2015.
November 27, 2019:Traded by theMilwaukee BrewerswithZach Daviesto theSan Diego PadresforEric Lauer,Luis Uríasand player to be named.
December 7, 2023:Traded by theSan Diego PadreswithJuan Sototo theNew York YankeesforJhony Brito,Kyle Higashioka,Michael King,Drew ThorpeandRandy Vásquez.
November 18, 2025:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
